spec.name: adaptive_goal_recontextualization
spec.description: Automatically analyze system state changes to re-interpret user intent in light of new context, ensuring subsequent actions align with the current reality rather than outdated assumptions.
spec.implementation:
def adaptive_goal_recontextualization(self, query, context_snapshot, history):
    """Re-evaluates the original query against the current context snapshot to adjust the action plan."""
    # Logic to merge new context into the goal definition
    adjusted_query = self.merge_context(query, context_snapshot)
    return adjusted_query
spec.rationale: The system previously missed that 'fresh start' implied clearing old goals. Adding a tool that automatically re-contextualizes intent based on state snapshots (like a cleared environment) will prevent the agent from pursuing obsolete goals, directly addressing the 'identify what capability would most improve it' requirement.
